trivia_bullets.text: Defiant Salvager originated in Aether Revolt (AER, 2017), the set depicting a rebel uprising by the Renegades against the Consulate on Kaladesh. The Aetherborn creature type is native to Kaladesh, where they are short-lived beings who arise spontaneously from aether. The flavor text's crash survivor line fits AER's context of a failed aerial assault. CMR is the card's third printing (also Double Masters 2020, Kaladesh Remastered 2020). [Scryfall]

Sacrificing artifacts or creatures to grow the Salvager is a sacrifice payoff that synergizes with token-generating artifacts (Treasure, Clue, Food) as well as persist and undying creatures. The sorcery-speed restriction prevents combat surprise but doesn't blunt its role as a Pauper Aristocrats finisher. Legal in Pauper, Pioneer, Modern, Legacy, Vintage, and Commander. [Scryfall]

Flavor text: "I didn't survive that crash just so I could fall to the likes of you." No speaker attributed. The line evokes the Renegade context of AER — the speaker has already endured catastrophe and refuses to be finished off. [Scryfall]
